ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

Off Calendar Oct-05-2020 Continued To Nov-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Pipes, Esq., counsel for Amy Gleneck, Administrator (appearing by video conference).

Mr. Pipes reports at the outset that the Administrator, Ms. Gleneck has died and that he is soliciting other family members to replace her as a successor administrator. The Court notes that the Inventory and Appraisal filed with the Court represents that no bond was required when in fact, bond was set at $10,000. Mr. Pipes will file an amended Inventory and Appraisal.

The Court advises counsel that the current practice now is to file a Report of Status and Petition for Additional Time to Administer Estate rather than just appear at hearing. The Court continues the matter to November 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. If counsel has filed the Report of Status and Petition for Additional Time to Administer Estate by that date, no appearance is necessary.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Court Examiner: Helen Yune Trowbridge; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. Bailiff: Deputy Johnson. (D204)
